config_meta.notes: PLACEHOLDER ONBOARDING — documented-absence pilot. Round-2 BoE recon (2026-06-10, re-verified same day by adversarial pass; see research/ga_recon/registry.json + UNIVERSE_SOURCES.md) found the district publishes NO board agendas or minutes anywhere online, and its BOE page's 'Public Participation in Board Meetings' link returns HTTP 404. The absence IS the record: this config exists so the public page exposes the gap and tracks the open-records remediation (draft: research/ga_recon/orr_drafts/glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.md). 2026 meeting-dates schedule IS posted (12 dates, ~7:00 PM, mix of 3rd/4th Thursdays, approved 2025-11-02).

officials_roster.notes: BOE page posts the board roster and the 2026 meeting-dates table. Confirm seat count/posts on first roster pass.

meeting_agendas_minutes.notes: No agendas or minutes published anywhere on the official site (verified live 2026-06-10, twice: recon + adversarial re-check; site search and Google site: search both empty). No Simbli/BoardDocs/eBoard portal linked. Records must be obtained via O.C.G.A. 50-18-70 request — draft prepared at research/ga_recon/orr_drafts/glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.md. Intake is phone/mail only: (706) 598-2121, no custodian email published.

known_gaps.explanation: The district publishes no board meeting agendas online. O.C.G.A. 50-14-1(e)(1) requires an agenda of matters expected to come before the body to be made available. Verified 2026-06-10 (recon + adversarial re-verification); the BOE page posts only a meeting-dates schedule.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Glascock County Consolidated Schools does not appear to publish its board meeting agendas online.
known_gaps.remediation: Open-records request drafted 2026-06-10 (research/ga_recon/orr_drafts/glascock-county-consolidated-schools-ga.md); agendas will be indexed from the response. Surfaced as an agenda_missing finding meanwhile.

known_gaps.explanation: The district publishes no board meeting minutes online. O.C.G.A. 50-14-1(e)(2)(B) makes minutes open public records once approved. Verified 2026-06-10.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Glascock County Consolidated Schools does not appear to publish its board meeting minutes online.
known_gaps.remediation: Included in the same open-records request; minutes will be indexed from the response.

known_gaps.explanation: The BOE page links a 'Public Participation in Board Meetings' document that returns HTTP 404 (verified 2026-06-10 in both passes), so the public-comment procedure is unknowable from the website.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: The district's published public-participation procedure link is broken, so how to address the board is not discoverable online.
known_gaps.remediation: Procedure requested alongside the records request; district contact (706) 598-2121.

known_gaps.explanation: No open-records page, designated custodian, or custodian email is published. Department staff emails exist on staff pages (e.g. HR, Finance), but no one is identified for O.C.G.A. 50-18-70 requests; intake is effectively phone/mail.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: The district does not publish who handles open-records requests or how to submit one.
known_gaps.remediation: Request will be mailed/phoned to the district office (1230 Panther Way, Gibson, GA 30810, (706) 598-2121) pending identification of a custodian email.
